We work the right way, wherever the project is:\n\n* Licensed and insured in MA — properly registered to work across NH, RI, and ME\n* General liability + workers comp coverage on every crew, every state\n* OSHA-compliant dustless sanding setup\n* Written contracts with line-item pricing on every project\n* Workmanship warranty on every refinish and install\n* 99% dust capture system — protect your air and your stuff\n* Zero-VOC water-based polyurethane standard, oil-based on request"}}]},{"node":"couple_about_area_img_col","element":"col","data":{"label":"AreaImgCol","animation":"fade-left","animation_duration":1200},"elements":[{"node":"couple_about_area_img","element":"image","data":{"label":"AreaImg","class":"rounded-xl overflow-hidden","background_image":[{"name":"ma-map.jpg","src":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1524661135-423995f22d0b?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80"}]}}]}]}]}]},{"node":"couple_about_final_cta","element":"section","data":{"label":"AboutFinalCta","class":"py-20","animation_duration":1000},"elements":[{"node":"couple_about_final_panel","element":"panel","data":{"label":"FinalPanel","class":"p-12 max-w-5xl mx-auto rounded-2xl bg-card border-2 border-primary shadow-2xl text-center","bg_color":"none","border_color":"none","hoverable":false,"focusable":false,"backdrop_blur":false,"padding":"none","rounded":"none"},"elements":[{"node":"couple_about_final_eyebrow","element":"subtitle","data":{"label":"Eyebrow","text":"READY TO START","class":"text-primary uppercase tracking-wider text-sm font-bold mb-2"}},{"node":"couple_about_final_title","element":"title","data":{"label":"Title","text":"Let's Talk About Your Floors","class":"display-3 mb-4 font-bold"}},{"node":"couple_about_final_p","element":"paragraph","data":{"label":"P","text":"Free in-home consultation and written estimate anywhere in MA, NH, RI, or Maine.
